allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Command psql -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Service -Name 'postgresql*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Status; ls 'C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e " import { createInterface } from 'readline'; const rl = createInterface\({ input: process.stdin }\); let data = ''; rl.on\('line', l => data += l\); rl.on\('close', \(\) => { const j = JSON.parse\(data\); const arts = j.catalogue_contrat_it.articles; console.log\('Articles:', arts.length\); console.log\('Sections:', [...new Set\(arts.map\(a=>a.categorie\)\)].join\(' | '\)\); }\); " kill %1)
